summary: HR Phase 1: Employee Master System - Complete API and UI Testing. All 19 backend tests pass. UI verification complete for /hr/employees page.

minor.issue: Response lacks 'count' key - only has 'departments' array. Should add count for consistency with positions endpoint

issues: Note: The route /hr/employees uses HREmployees.jsx (new HR module) while sidebar 'Data Karyawan' links to /employees using Employees.jsx (ERP module). Two different employee management interfaces exist - may need consolidation.

critical_code_review_comments: HR PHASE 1 VERIFICATION COMPLETE - ALL FEATURES WORKING:
- Pagination params: page, limit, total, total_pages
- Returns 11 departments with id, code, name, description
- Codes: DIR, OPS, FIN, HRD, IT, MKT, etc.
- Returns 15 positions with id, code, name, department_id, level
- Endpoint ready for: ktp, npwp, contract, photo, other
- Max size: 5MB, Formats: jpg, jpeg, png, pdf
- UI shows document type selector and Upload button
- Returns 2 sales employees from employees collection
- Stats cards: Total Karyawan 21, Aktif 20, Departemen 11, Posisi 15
- Employee table with NIK, Nama, Departemen, Posisi, Email, Telepon, Gaji, Status, Aksi
- Search input, Status filter, Department filter
- View/Edit/Delete action buttons for each row
- Detail modal with Document Upload section
seed_data_creation: None - used existing data: 21 employees, 11 departments, 15 positions
context_for_next_testing_agent: HR Phase 1 Employee Master fully tested. /api/hr/* endpoints working. UI at /hr/employees verified. Document upload UI exists with type selector (KTP, NPWP, Contract, Photo, Other). Sales mapping working - 2 employees (SLS-001, SLS-002). Note: /employees route uses different component (Employees.jsx) than /hr/employees (HREmployees.jsx).
